raw: This pass is an e-voucher . Coupon is delivered by email. Coupon offers admission for up to 4 people (adults or children) at half price per person. All visitors after their first birthday require a ticket. After receiving a library discount coupon, the Boston Children's Museum recommends reserving your entry ticket with them online as museum capacity is limited at this time. A library pass is not an admission ticket and does not guarantee a reservation to the Museum.
